metadata.description: Managed-autonomy workflow for Claude Code: 11-step loop with audit/critique skills, four-lens parallel staff-review, diff-focused security + a11y reviews (with per-diff early-exit on docs-only PRs), agent-isolated planner + docs helpers, project-config-driven ship + ship-spike pipelines with stale-base preflight gate. v1.2.6 adds bounded-retry mechanical preflight (new `preflightCmd` slot; Step 1c of /flow:ship + /flow:ship-spike; N≤3 retries with diff-hash oscillation detection; loops only on externally-verifiable exit codes — reviewer outputs at Step 2 stay single-pass). v1.2.5 sharpens the reviewer pipeline along adversarial dimensions: auditor + plan-critic gain a prove-or-disprove self-check that drops findings without specific evidence; lens-staff-engineer reads adversarially ('assume the diff is broken'); /flow:security-review shifts to red-team identity ('find an exploitable vulnerability') with a trace-input-source disprove step.

plugins.name: flow
plugins.description: Managed-autonomy 11-step loop. Bundles the skeptical reviewers (auditor + plan-critic), the four-lens parallel staff-review (engineer / UX-designer / design-engineer / push-further), diff-focused /flow:security-review + /flow:accessibility-review, /flow:ship + /flow:ship-spike pipelines, /flow:workflow-help, /flow:doctor verification skill, planner + docs context-isolation agents, portable rules (general, plan-discipline, documentation, exploration), memory-corpus tool, flow.config.json JSON Schema (21 slots), and default hooks. v1.2.6 adds bounded-retry mechanical preflight to /flow:ship + /flow:ship-spike (new `preflightCmd` slot at Step 1c; on non-zero exit, fix-and-retry up to N=3 invocations with diff-hash oscillation detection; loops ONLY on externally-verifiable exit codes per Anthropic's evaluator-optimizer guidance — reviewer outputs at Step 2 stay deliberately single-pass to prevent the reward-hacking failure mode that loops over LLM-judgment outputs invite). v1.2.5 sharpens the reviewer pipeline along adversarial dimensions: auditor + plan-critic gain a prove-or-disprove self-check (findings must survive an attempt to cite the specific session text or third citation that would invalidate them); lens-staff-engineer reads adversarially ('assume the diff is broken — what's the most likely break?') for higher correctness recall; /flow:security-review shifts to red-team identity ('find an exploitable vulnerability') with a trace-input-source-back disprove step. Plan-critic also gains fan-out hunt vocabulary in Internal incoherence (PR-G FOLLOW-UP #5). v1.2.3 adds consistency discipline (FB-0010): the lens-staff-engineer agent now explicitly hunts fan-out contradictions (counts/names/slots referenced in N places, only some updated) and silent-skip patterns (failures swallowed via `2>/dev/null` / unset-fallback / regex inversion); /flow:doctor gains Check 2.5 comparing documented slot counts against the schema source-of-truth; workflow.md Step 4 names the discipline.
